name: Calibre Server
description: OPDS content server for ebooks — search, browse, and download from your Calibre library
author: Crow

env_vars.name: CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path to your Calibre library folder

env_vars.name: CALIBRE_USERNAME
env_vars.description: HTTP Basic auth username (if auth enabled)

notes: Self-host via Docker (set CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH) or connect to existing Calibre content server (set CALIBRE_URL).
